items.title: Iranian woman arrested in US for allegedly trafficking arms to Sudan
items.dek: Shamim Mafi is accused of brokering the sales of arms to Sudan's defence ministry on behalf of Iran.

items.title: Rebel Wilson's claims against actress are 'malicious concoctions', Australian court hears
items.dek: Wilson has been accused of defaming the star of her film The Deb over an incident involving a bath in Bondi.
